title: [BUG]: Required property 'pattern_day_trader' not found in JSON
author: brianberns
body:
### Is there an existing issue for this?

- [x] I have searched the existing issues

### Current Behavior

Alpaca has removed `pattern_day_trader` from the Account JSON, but `GetAccountAsync` still considers it a required property, so the call fails. See https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/changelog/2026-06-03-pdt-f3c04da for the official announcement.

### Expected Behavior

`GetAccountAsync` should not require properties that Alpaca has removed from the JSON.

### Steps To Reproduce

```markdown
let! account = api.TradingClient.GetAccountAsync()
```

### Environment

```markdown
- SDK Version: 7.2.0
- OS (version, bitness): Windows 11 x64
- .NET SDK (version): 10
- target process .NET version/bitness: 10 x64
```

### Anything else?

_No response_

title: [QUESTION]: Close All Positions - Order Information Missing
author: fischja
body: The close all positions method `DeleteAllPositionsAsync` returns the `Symbol` and `IsSuccess` properties for each order, but does not include in the actual order body information as specified in the [API docs](https://docs.alpaca.markets/reference/deleteallopenpositions-1). Could this please be added to the return type? Thanks!

title: [QUESTION]: How can I calculate PnL for closed options positions
author: samballa07
body:
### Is there an existing issue for this?

- [x] I have searched the existing issues

### What is your question?

For context, I am speaking from the standpoint of selling options. There doesnt seem to be an api to retrieve PnL for closed covered call positions. Answers online say we must do a calculation based on the Activities API but there is no standardized answer. It feels a bit awkward to calculate this ourselves so I was wondering if the team has explored providing this for free. My question is two-fold:
1. Is there a standardized way we can achieve this that reliably accounts for expirations, fees, etc.. after the position is closed. 
2. Is this something we can add to the SDK API as some kind of helper utility?

### Anything else?

_No response_

title: [FEATURE]: Add spin-off adjustment, Add possibility to include multiple adjustments.
author: superichmann
body:
### Is there an existing issue for this?

- [x] I have searched the existing issues

### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

The historical bars endpoint has these options:

- raw: no adjustments
- split: adjust price and volume for forward and reverse stock splits
- dividend: adjust price for cash dividends
- **spin-off: adjust price for spin-offs**
- all: apply all above adjustments

in the .NET sdk only these options are possible: raw,split,dividend,all. 

As well, the selection is represented by ENUM, which makes it possible to only select ONE adjustment. so, for example, if I want only `split` and `spin-off` adjustments it is currently impossible.


### Describe the solution you'd like

please add also spin-off.
Would be nice to add multiple `adjustment` strings into one api request through .NET client, as enabled by the api endpoint.

title: [BUG]: CUSIPs missing
author: fischja
body:
### Is there an existing issue for this?

- [x] I have searched the existing issues

As per https://docs.alpaca.markets/changelog/cusip, the API now returns asset CUSIPs in addition to symbols. These fields are currently missing, notably in the Corporate Actions and Assets API response classes. Would it be possible to add these? Cheers!

title: [BUG]: Exception on TradeUpdate
author: GeorgeDonald
body:
### Is there an existing issue for this?

- [x] I have searched the existing issues

### Current Behavior

I always get the following exception in StreamingClient OnError event when Alpaca automatically closes some of ITM options spread positions at 3:45PM and in the TradeUpdate event, it is a 2-Let order, so the AssetClass of the root order of the legs is empty and serializer throws the exception.
It seems like it is an exception from the SDK package. Please take a look at it.

Newtonsoft.Json.JsonSerializationException: Error converting value "" to type 'Alpaca.Markets.AssetClass'. Path 'data.order.asset_class', line 1, position 677.
 ---> System.ArgumentException: Must specify valid information for parsing in the string.
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Utilities.EnumUtils.ParseEnum(Type enumType, NamingStrategy namingStrategy, String value, Boolean disallowNumber)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Converters.StringEnumConverter.ReadJson(JsonReader reader, Type objectType, Object existingValue, JsonSerializer serializer)
   --- End of inner exception stack trace ---
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Converters.StringEnumConverter.ReadJson(JsonReader reader, Type objectType, Object existingValue, JsonSerializer serializer)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Serialization.JsonSerializerInternalReader.DeserializeConvertable(JsonConverter converter, JsonReader reader, Type objectType, Object existingValue)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Serialization.JsonSerializerInternalReader.PopulateObject(Object newObject, JsonReader reader, JsonObjectContract contract, JsonProperty member, String id)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Serialization.JsonSerializerInternalReader.CreateObject(JsonReader reader, Type objectType, JsonContract contract, JsonProperty member, JsonContainerContract containerContract, JsonProperty containerMember, Object existingValue)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Serialization.JsonSerializerInternalReader.CreateValueInternal(JsonReader reader, Type objectType, JsonContract contract, JsonProperty member, JsonContainerContract containerContract, JsonProperty containerMember, Object existingValue)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Serialization.JsonSerializerInternalReader.PopulateObject(Object newObject, JsonReader reader, JsonObjectContract contract, JsonProperty member, String id)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Serialization.JsonSerializerInternalReader.CreateObject(JsonReader reader, Type objectType, JsonContract contract, JsonProperty member, JsonContainerContract containerContract, JsonProperty containerMember, Object existingValue)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Serialization.JsonSerializerInternalReader.CreateValueInternal(JsonReader reader, Type objectType, JsonContract contract, JsonProperty member, JsonContainerContract containerContract, JsonProperty containerMember, Object existingValue)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Serialization.JsonSerializerInternalReader.Deserialize(JsonReader reader, Type objectType, Boolean checkAdditionalContent)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.JsonSerializer.DeserializeInternal(JsonReader reader, Type objectType)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken.ToObject(Type objectType, JsonSerializer jsonSerializer)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken.ToObject(Type objectType)
   at Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken.ToObject[T]()
   at Alpaca.Markets.ActionExtensions.DeserializeAndInvoke[TApi,TJson](Action`1 eventHandler, JToken eventArg)
   at Alpaca.Markets.AlpacaStreamingClient.handleTradeUpdate(JToken token)
   at Alpaca.Markets.StreamingClientBase`1.<>c__DisplayClass28_0`1.<HandleMessage>b__0()
   at Alpaca.Markets.SynchronizationQueue.processingTask()


### Expected Behavior

AssetClass should not be empty or can be deserialized with empty value.

### Steps To Reproduce

```markdown
1. Add StreamingClient OnError and TradeUpdate events
2. Place options spread orders and wait for being filled
3. Wait for options positions to be in the money and 3:45PM so system automatically close these positions with 2-Leg order
4. OnError event will be triggered with the exception
```

### Environment

```markdown
- SDK Version: 7.2.0
- OS (version, bitness): Windows 11
- .NET SDK (version): 8.0
- target process .NET version/bitness: 8.0
```

### Anything else?

_No response_

title: [QUESTION]: msgpack in websockets
author: jordi-z80
body:
### Is there an existing issue for this?

- [x] I have searched the existing issues

### What is your question?

Hi, according to this message:

https://github.com/alpacahq/alpaca-trade-api-csharp/blob/ad8225f3a8e64ce7de43004d6b62b4a2f499acd5/Alpaca.Markets/Parameters/StreamingClientConfiguration.cs#L36

the current WS implementation you're using (which if I'm not wrong it's default .NET ClientWebSocket) doesn't allow to set the Content-Type. I'm trying to use msgpack myself in a websocket accessing alpaca (not through this library though), but it's been impossible.

As writing a full WS implementation for just one parameter is overkill, and asking for a ClientWebSocket fix may literally take years, have you considered requesting an alternative way to switch msgpack on? 

Thanks.

### Anything else?

_No response_

title: Fix JSON deserialization issues
author: OlegRa
body:
The underlying REST API added some new enum values in different cases, and the current JSON deserialization logic does not handle these cases:

- [x] The new `margin_requirement_long` and `margin_requirement_short` fields have been added to the asset object. Go [#339](https://github.com/alpacahq/alpaca-trade-api-go/pull/339)
- [x] The new `boats` and `overnight` values for the stock data feed enumeration. Python [#609](https://github.com/alpacahq/alpaca-py/pull/609), Go [#346](https://github.com/alpacahq/alpaca-trade-api-go/pull/346)
- [x] The old `maintanence_margin_requirement` field of the asset object is deprecated. Go [#339](https://github.com/alpacahq/alpaca-trade-api-go/pull/339)
- [x] The new `crypto_perp` value for the asset class enumeration. Python [#625](https://github.com/alpacahq/alpaca-py/pull/625)
- [x] The new `ASCX` value for the asset exchange enumeration. Python [#625](https://github.com/alpacahq/alpaca-py/pull/625)
- [x] The `base_value` of the portfolio history item can be null. Python [#597](https://github.com/alpacahq/alpaca-py/pull/597)

title: Update DocFX tool version
author: OlegRa
body: The documentation generation tool DocFX package name/version has been changed. We should update project files and the related GitHub actions.

title: Update .NET public API analyzer
author: OlegRa
body: The new major version of the `Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.PublicApiAnalyzers` package is more restrictive and generates a lot of new warnings. It would be better to update it in the scope of a separate task/branch.

title: [BUG]: .NET Maui iOS will fail to JsonAccount deserialization in AppStore
author: logikonline
body:
### Is there an existing issue for this?

- [x] I have searched the existing issues

### Current Behavior

`JSON parsing error: Unable to find a constructor to use for type Alpaca.Markets.JsonAccount. A class should either have a default constructor, one constructor with arguments or a constructor marked with the JsonConstructor attribute. Path 'id', line 1, position 6..`

Currently iOS builds using project will fail deserialization.  I have tried adding a trimmerroot but that causes the app to crash.

`<ItemGroup>
  <TrimmerRootAssembly Include="Alpaca.Markets" />
</ItemGroup>`

The crux of the issue appears in the helper routine.  I tried modifying it but the method of deserializing appears to fail reflection.

[AlpacaSource.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19152379/AlpacaSource.zip)

`<DeserializeAsync>d__1`2[[Alpaca.Markets.IAccount, Alpaca.Markets, Version=8.0.0.9, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=16fb7a27ac3b9689],[Alpaca.Markets.JsonAccount, Alpaca.Markets, Version=8.0.0.9, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=16fb7a27ac3b9689]].MoveNext()
   at Alpaca.Markets.HttpClientExtensions.<callAndDeserializeAsync>d__6`2[[Alpaca.Markets.IAccount, Alpaca.Markets, Version=8.0.0.9, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=16fb7a27ac3b9689],[Alpaca.Markets.JsonAccount, Alpaca.Markets, Version=8.0.0.9, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=16fb7a27ac3b9689]].MoveNext()
   at Alpaca.Markets.HttpClientExtensions.<callAndDeserializeAsync>d__4`2[[Alpaca.Markets.IAccount, Alpaca.Markets, Version=8.0.0.9, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=16fb7a27ac3b9689],[Alpaca.Markets.JsonAccount, Alpaca.Markets, Version=8.0.0.9, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=16fb7a27ac3b9689]].MoveNext()
   at `



### Expected Behavior

Should decode into the objects.

### Steps To Reproduce

```markdown
The app works locally on the simulator and deploying on my local device but builds uploaded to the store will fail.
```

### Environment

```markdown
- SDK Version: tried 7.20 and modified 8 beta to try
- OS (version, bitness): iOS 16.7 to 18
- .NET SDK (version): 9
```

### Anything else?

_No response_

title: [BUG]: Paper Environment queries return Alpaca.Markets.RestClientErrorException: Forbidden
author: Joe-V2

title: Add support for the delayed SIP feed
author: OlegRa
body:
The `MarketDataFeed` enumeration should be extended with the new value `DelayedSip` that should be serialized into the `delayed_sip` JSON string. This value can be used only for "latest" requests and streaming, but we'll not add any client-side validation for now. See the following Go reference implementation:

- alpacahq/alpaca-trade-api-go#325
